docket_entries.description: STIPULATION FOR HEARING BEFORE PRO TEM JUDGE JEAN MILEFF. FILED BY TJANDRA, CHIELLA BELL, MICHAEL

THE COURT HAS ORDERED THE FOLLOWING JUDGMENT ENTERED: IT IS ADJUDGED THAT PLAINTIFF TJANDRA, CHIELLA RECOVER FROM DEFENDANT BELL, MICHAEL $7,500.00 PRINCIPAL, $237.50 COSTS, TOTAL JUDGMENT $7,737.50 STAY OF EXECUTION 30 DAYS PLAINTIFF'S EXHIBITS RECEIVED
AUTO ACCIDENT CLAIM OF PLAINTIFF FOR $10,000.00 FILED BY TJANDRA, CHIELLA AS TO DEFENDANT BELL, MICHAEL ORDER SETTING TRIAL ISSUED FOR DEC-12-2012 AT 10:00 AM IN DEPT 506

SMALL CLAIMS CALENDAR OF DEC-12-2012 - TAKEN UNDER SUBMISSION AS OF DEC-12-2012 BY JUDGE PRO TEM JEAN MILEFF. APPEARANCES BY BOTH PARTIES. PLAINTIFFS EXHIBITS RETAINED. DEFENDANTS EXHIBITS NOT RETAINED. JUDGE PRO TEM: JEAN MILEFF. CLERK: P. NATT. NOT REPORTED. (506)
